title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (a $7 billion AI enterprise search company), discusses his principle that competitive advantage comes from focus and avoiding redundant efforts rather than from larger models or better pitches. He emphasizes building only what others are not building well and recounts leaving a previous unicorn to start Glean after observing organizational information retrieval challenges.
